Send an invoice by email

Usage
  fakturownia invoice send-email --id ID

Required Flags
  --id (string): Invoice ID

Optional Flags
  --email-to (string[]): Override recipients for the invoice email
  --email-cc (string[]): Override CC recipients for the invoice email
  --email-pdf (bool): Attach the invoice PDF default=false
  --update-buyer-email (bool): Update the invoice buyer or recipient email when email-to is provided default=false
  --print-option (string): PDF print option enum=copy,duplicate,original,original_and_copy

Global Flags
  --profile (string): Select a named profile
  --json (bool): Alias for --output json default=false
  --output (string): Output format default=human enum=human,json
  --quiet (bool): Emit bare values when exactly one field or column remains default=false
  --fields (string[]): Project JSON envelope data fields using dot/bracket paths like number or positions[].name
  --columns (string[]): Select human table columns using dot/bracket paths like number or positions[].name
  --raw (bool): Emit the upstream JSON response body directly when supported default=false
  --dry-run (bool): Accepted on read-only commands and reserved for future mutating request previews default=false
  --timeout-ms (int): HTTP timeout in milliseconds default=30000
  --max-retries (int): Maximum retry attempts for idempotent reads on network or 5xx failures default=2
  --non-interactive (bool): Disable interactive behavior default=true
  --config (string): Override the config file path

Environment Variables
  FAKTUROWNIA_PROFILE: Select a profile unless --profile is provided
  FAKTUROWNIA_URL: Override the base account URL from any profile
  FAKTUROWNIA_API_TOKEN: Override the API token from any profile

Output Modes
  human, json
  raw: supported

Exit Codes
  0: success
  2: usage or validation error
  3: not found
  4: authentication or permission failure
  5: conflict
  6: network or timeout failure
  7: reserved for throttling or retry budget exhaustion
  8: remote API rejected the request
  9: internal CLI failure

Examples
  fakturownia invoice send-email --id 100 --json
  fakturownia invoice send-email --id 100 --email-to billing@example.com --email-pdf --json
  fakturownia invoice send-email --id 100 --email-to billing@example.com --update-buyer-email --print-option original --dry-run --json

Usage:
  fakturownia invoice send-email --id ID [flags]

Flags:
      --email-cc strings      override email CC recipients; may be repeated
      --email-pdf             attach the invoice PDF to the email
      --email-to strings      override email recipients; may be repeated
  -h, --help                  help for send-email
      --id string             invoice ID
      --print-option string   PDF print option
      --update-buyer-email    update the invoice buyer or recipient email when email-to is provided

Global Flags:
      --columns strings   select human table columns using dot/bracket paths like number or positions[].name
      --config string     override the config file path
      --dry-run           accepted on read-only commands and reserved for future mutating previews
      --fields strings    project JSON envelope data fields using dot/bracket paths like number or positions[].name
      --json              alias for --output json
      --max-retries int   maximum retries for idempotent reads (default 2)
      --non-interactive   disable interactive behavior (default true)
      --output string     output format: human|json (default "human")
      --profile string    select a named profile
  -q, --quiet             emit bare values when exactly one field or column remains
      --raw               emit the upstream JSON response body directly when supported
      --timeout-ms int    HTTP timeout in milliseconds (default 30000)
